globalNews.title: Ukrainian drone hits upmarket Moscow high-rise ahead of Victory Day celebrations
globalNews.summary: The attack comes as the Kremlin prepares to hold a scaled-back military parade on Saturday.

globalNews.title: Three dead in suspected virus outbreak on Atlantic cruise ship
globalNews.summary: The operator of the MV Hondius ship says a Dutch husband and wife, as well as a German national, have died but the cause has not yet been established.

globalNews.title: Former New York City mayor Rudy Giuliani in critical condition in hospital
globalNews.summary: The long-time champion of Trump and former New York mayor is in hospital, according to his spokesman.

globalNews.title: Modi's BJP conquers Bengal, one of India's toughest political frontiers
globalNews.summary: West Bengal’s verdict could reshape not just the state’s politics, but the future trajectory of Modi’s BJP.

globalNews.title: European leaders converge on Armenia as Russia looks on
globalNews.summary: Two European summits are being held in a country long considered Russia's closest ally in the region.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin in ‘disbelief rally’ as traders spot $84K BTC price target
cryptoNews.summary: Bitcoin’s rally on Monday pushed it above $80,000 for the first time since January as analysts say BTC price could rise further to fill the futures gap at $84,000 in the short term.

cryptoNews.title: SEC delays prediction market ETFs over mechanics and risk concerns: Report
cryptoNews.summary: The regulator reportedly requested more information from Roundhill, GraniteShares and Bitwise about how the event contract funds would work.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin price eyes $96K as institutions absorb 500% of daily BTC supply
cryptoNews.summary: In past instances, BTC has averaged 24% gains in one month when institutional demand absorbed over 500% of the daily mined supply.

cryptoNews.title: South Korea crypto sector warns AML proposal goes too far: Report
cryptoNews.summary: Crypto industry body DAXA said the proposed rules could push suspicious transaction reports from South Korea’s five largest exchanges to more than 5.4 million a year, Yonhap reported.

cryptoNews.title: BTC price can ‘easily’ hit $95K: Five things to know in Bitcoin this week
cryptoNews.summary: Bitcoin gained fresh bullish BTC price targets after hitting new three-month highs above $80,000.

aiNews.title: 5 days only: Bring a partner or colleague and get 50% off a second TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 pass
aiNews.summary: The BOGO offer is live. For a limited time, buy one pass to TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 and get 50% off a second of the same ticket type. Offer ends this Friday, May 8. Save here.

aiNews.title: ‘This is fine’ creator says AI startup stole his art
aiNews.summary: The ad comes from Artisan, the AI startup behind billboards urging businesses to "stop hiring humans."

aiNews.title: In Harvard study, AI offered more accurate emergency room diagnoses than two human doctors
aiNews.summary: A new study examines how large language models perform in a variety of medical contexts, including real emergency room cases — where at least one model seemed to be more accurate than human doctors.

aiNews.title: AI-generated actors and scripts are now ineligible for Oscars
